paper_focus.title: Melting, Processing, and Properties of Disordered Fe-Al and Fe-Al-C Based Alloys
paper_focus.research_objective: To develop a cost-effective melting route for sound Fe-Al lightweight steels containing 7–9 wt.% Al and to elucidate the influence of carbon on the microstructure and mechanical properties of Fe-7Al alloys.
material_systems: Fe-9Al (wt.%) disordered solid solution alloy (with short-range ordering)
Fe-7Al-C alloys with nominal carbon contents of 0.02, 0.15, 0.35, 0.5, and 1.0 wt.%
main_process_variables: air induction melting with proprietary flux cover (AIMFC)
expected_information_axis: microstructure (optical microscopy, XRD phases, precipitate volume fraction)
mechanical properties (hardness, tensile UTS, YS, elongation)
figure_evidence (optical micrographs, XRD patterns, tensile data tables)
